headline: Regeneron (REGN) Stock Looks Undervalued Even After A 20% Gain
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals stock has gained 20.2% over the past year, yet its current valuation checks still lean toward the shares looking inexpensive rather than stretched. Over the last 12 months, Regeneron Pharmaceuticals has returned 20.2%, which puts recent investors in profit while raising the question of how much value is left on the table. Regulatory momentum around treatments such as cemdisiran and progress in areas like weight loss can support growth expectations. The risk is that...
